data.title: Liam Mona Expands Mona Power Nationwide, Driving Growth in Solar and EV Infrastructure
data.description: On April 2, 2026, in Detroit, Liam Mona assumed the role of President and Managing Partner at Mona Power, an expanding solar energy firm. This company focuses on providing residential and commercial solar systems, as well as electric vehicle charging options throughout the United States. Mona Power has experienced significant growth and differentiation by offering high-quality solutions in the renewable energy sector.

data.title: LG Chairman Kwang Mo Koo Visits U.S. ESS Hub 'Vertech,' Emphasizing Leadership in AI-Era Energy Infrastructure
data.description: In April 2, 2026, Kwang Mo Koo, the Chairman and CEO of LG Corp, traveled to the United States to assess the company's upcoming growth strategies. He specifically concentrated on energy infrastructure as a crucial element in the AI era. This move demonstrates Chairman Koo's dedication to steering the company towards success in this rapidly evolving technological landscape.

data.title: ShipMonk Opens First Fulfillment Center Designed Specifically for Apparel Brands
data.description: ShipMonk, a global fulfillment provider for high-growth and enterprise ecommerce brands, has unveiled a new fulfillment center in Louisville, Kentucky. The facility, tailored for apparel brands, represents the company's first location dedicated to a specific category. This center is designed to address the unique challenges of apparel fulfillment, such as handling size and style-driven SKU complexity. The launch in Louisville signifies ShipMonk's focus on enhancing services for apparel brands, highlighting its commitment to industry-specific solutions and customer-centric operations.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- Kimberly-Clark Corporation/
data.description: Kimberly-Clark Corporation has recently announced the launch of "Language of Bedwetting" by Goodnites®, which is the first comprehensive language specifically created to assist autistic children in communicating their needs, wants, and emotions related to bedwetting. This groundbreaking initiative aims to provide support to autistic children dealing with bedwetting issues. This announcement was made on 02-Apr-2026 via PR Newswire.

data.title: Rocket Resume Files Antitrust Suit Against Bold, Alleging Deception and Anticompetitive Conduct by the Owner of CareerBuilder, Monster.com and dozens of other resume-builder websites
data.description: On April 2, 2026, in San Francisco, it was revealed that a single entity overseeing numerous similar online resume creation services is involved in a significant monopolistic operation aimed at deceiving and engaging in anticompetitive practices. This scheme allegedly exploits job seekers, leading to their systematic exploitation. The company in question is responsible for controlling dozens of nearly identical services, which has prompted concerns about fraudulent activities impacting a large number of individuals in the job market.
